Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-02 Home
About This Dashboard
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows two exceptional performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. BVN ranks first with a score of 94.1, driven by extraordinary 10-year returns of 690.48% and consistent outperformance versus SPY across all timeframes (216.98% ahead over 1 year, 439.47% over 10 years). AGI follows closely as rank 2 with even more dramatic long-term gains—a 1198.23% 10-year return and 947.22% outperformance versus SPY over the same period—though its recent 1-month performance (30.38%) is more modest than BVN's (10.99%). Both tickers pass all moving average filters and show 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds, suggesting sustained uptrends, though AGI's "bad_spy_score" of 0 versus BVN's 0.586 indicates AGI has achieved superior risk-adjusted returns relative to market benchmarks. BVN's strong 0.711 correlation with gold (IAU) and negative correlations with bonds (TLT at -0.102) suggest it captures commodity and inflation dynamics, while AGI shows broader diversified strength across longer horizons.
